import os
import pickle
from pathlib import Path

def main():
    ckpt_dir = Path("checkpoints/baseline")
    ckpt_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    model = {
        "type": "greedy_utility",
        "description": "Selects the neighboring node with the highest utility value provided by the environment."
    }
    with open(ckpt_dir / "model.pkl", "wb") as f:
        pickle.dump(model, f)
    print("Saved baseline greedy utility model to", ckpt_dir)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
